title: polypodium chiapense
intro: Polypodium chiapense, also known as Chiapas polypody, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly found in Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The health benefits of Polypodium chiapense include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparation of Polypodium chiapense typically involves drying the leaves and roots, then making them into teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use.
